creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Bob

Two things
* does the manpage patch really make sense? A project using libcsv should just add -I/usr/local/include and use #include <csv.h>
* why did you rename the PROFILE option? PROFILE seems to be the goto-way for the other ports having profiling options -- so it would make sense to keep it named that way.

mfg Tobias
